initial_draft:
Okay, I'm Player BLUE. Let's analyze this situation. Player RED has $100 and is offering $15. I have $0. Accepting this trade would give me $15, which is better than having $0. Rejecting would mean we both lose everything. Since I have nothing to lose by accepting, and accepting gives me something, I should accept.

```
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering $15. Accepting is better than rejecting, as rejecting means we both lose everything. I have nothing to lose by accepting. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message>I accept your offer! I'll take the $15. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
